violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wiping cloth bucket found with less than 150ppm Quat. -Cloths randomly throughout prep areas and trailer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -No date marking on open/prepared food items (i.e. frosting, cut plums, etc.).

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dough/debris at interior bottom and handle of refrigerator (in trailer). -Some frost at interior surfaces of small chest freezer. -Minimal residue/debris at interior of blue microwave. -Residue at interior of Avantco oven in trailer.
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
